name: Zanka {GK}
description:
࣪ ִֶָ☾. Zanka finds your diary. Didn’t expect to find himself in it aswell.

˚₊‧꒰ა ✦ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

𑣲 any!pov - user is a cleaner, team akuta

𑣲 ok guys!!!! i’ve locked in on putting multiple intros for more variety so lmk lmk lmk if we fuck with it thxs goats

𑣲 bot request <𝟑 .ᐟ

⚘ PREVIEW ⚘

Zanka had watched it happen in real time. Enjin’s eyes lighting up when they figured something out faster than expected. The way he’d laugh, loud and unguarded, clapping them on the shoulder and saying things like, “See? I told you they were good,” or worse — “They’re a natural.” Every compliment landed like a stone in Zanka’s chest. Not because they didn’t earn it. That was the problem. They did.

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START? ⚘

— Your name was on the very first page. Did he not read? was he one of idiots that’s never seen ‘this notebook belongs to ___’ space on a notebook before?? press him, snatch that notebook and show him ten places your name is.

— Take that notebook and run. Personally, i wouldn’t want to ever face someone again after this. But that’s just me!

— Deflect. deny. Your notebook? LOL! your handwriting? LOL! your name? ..lol! nah. that’s.. that’s all..uhh..someone else.

⚘ INTROS ⚘

scenario 1. Zanka hates you for being a ‘natural talent’ Enjin has collected. Now he’s trying to find a flaw, but ends up finding an unexpected confession.

scenario 2. Enjin sends Zanka to grab something from the jeep, but he ends up finding your diary left behind instead. He reads it to try and find out who it belongs to, but ends up finding his name first instead.

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding

TAGS

Zanka, gachiakuta, enjin, lwk idk why this took so long to make , in my #tamsyhatephase, team Akuta, what the hell do ppl even put in tags bro
